setupInstructions.message: Run the following commands to install required testing packages:
setupInstructions.alternativeMethod: Add the PackageReference elements to your .csproj file and run 'dotnet restore'

fileReports.summary: Added comprehensive tests for UnitTest1 class, covering constructor and method invocation scenarios
recommendations: Add meaningful implementation to Test1() method
Consider adding parameters or return values to Test1() for more meaningful testing
Implement specific test scenarios based on intended method behavior
keyImprovements: Ensured no exceptions are thrown during method execution
fileReports.note: Current implementation is minimal and requires further specification of method purpose

fileReports.summary: Generated comprehensive test suite for ProducerWrapper with 8 test cases covering constructor validation, message production, error handling, and disposal scenarios.
recommendations: Consider adding more robust error handling in writeMessage method
Add logging mechanism instead of direct Console.WriteLine calls
Implement retry mechanism for message production
fileReports.note: Tests use localhost:9092 as bootstrap servers - may need adjustment for actual Kafka configuration

fileReports.summary: Generated comprehensive test suite for ConsumerWrapper with 8 test cases covering constructor validation, message reading, exception handling, and disposal scenarios
recommendations: Consider adding more detailed logging in exception scenarios
Implement a more robust error handling strategy in readMessage()
Add support for cancellation token in readMessage() method
fileReports.note: Tests use Moq for mocking Kafka consumer dependencies

fileReports.summary: Generated comprehensive unit tests for OrderRequest model covering constructor, property setting, default values, boundary conditions, and enum validation with 8 test methods
recommendations: Consider adding data validation attributes for productname and quantity
Implement custom validation logic for order request properties
Add more complex business rule validation for order requests
keyImprovements: Tested default and custom object initialization
fileReports.note: Tests cover basic model behavior without external dependencies

fileReports.summary: Generated comprehensive test suite for OrderController covering model validation, serialization, producer interaction, and constructor initialization
recommendations: Add more detailed validation for OrderRequest model
Consider adding logging for better traceability
Implement more robust error handling in PostAsync method
fileReports.note: Ensure ProducerWrapper and OrderRequest models are properly defined in the project
